notes: JANGTQ native fast path: MXTQ models now load via jang_tools.load_jangtq with native TurboQuantLinear / TurboQuantSwitchLinear modules and P3/P15/P17/P18 Metal-kernel optimizations. Live-tested on MiniMax-M2.7-JANGTQ_2L: 42 tok/s steady-state. Plus mlxstudio#69 fix: explicit image attachments no longer silently dropped when session detection misses.
